title: gomphocentrum andringitranum
intro: Gomphocentrum andringitranum, also known as the Andringitra orchid, is a species of orchid native to Madagascar. It is traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Gomphocentrum andringitranum typically involve extracting its active compounds, which can be used in teas, infusions, or other medicinal formulations.
